headline: Your design system is trapped in Figma
body: Most design systems are trapped in Figma. AI agents can't parse them, so every AI-generated UI gets your brand wrong. Refero Styles puts your entire design language into one DESIGN.md file. Colors, type scale, spacing, components. All machine-readable.
image_keyword: design tokens markdown file AI readable

headline: 12x faster than Figma API responses
body: AI agents process structured markdown 12x faster than Figma API responses. Your coding assistant already speaks markdown fluently. When you feed it design tokens as plain text, you skip the translation layer entirely.

headline: Everything in one typed schema
body: A typical DESIGN.md holds 6 color primitives, 8 type scale steps, a 4px spacing grid, and 15-20 component schemas. That's enough for any AI agent to build pixel-accurate UI without guessing.

headline: 3x fewer design-dev handoff cycles
body: Teams using AI-readable design tokens report 3x fewer handoff cycles between design and engineering. The reason is mechanical. Remove the human middleman and sync happens at machine speed.

headline: Old path vs new path
body: Old path: designer exports tokens, developer copies them, tokens drift apart by week 2. New path: designer updates DESIGN.md, AI reads it in 200ms, every component reflects the change immediately.

headline: Follow me for 30 days of AI tools that actually change how you work.
